reported_entities.name: 中華電信 (Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd.)
reported_entities.claim: Official corporate site of Chunghwa Telecom, Taiwan's largest integrated telecom operator (5G mobile, HiNet broadband/fixed line, MOD IPTV). Official English name: Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. (NYSE/TWSE: CHT).

reported_entities.name: 中華電信我的服務中心 (Chunghwa Telecom customer self-service portal)
reported_entities.claim: Customer self-service portal subdomain of Chunghwa Telecom's official site.

reported_entities.name: HiNet 網頁郵件服務
reported_entities.claim: Webmail service under HiNet, Chunghwa Telecom's ISP brand.

notes: Post-fix Arm B rerun. Salva returned 7 qualified entities (up from prior run's reported zero-entity failure), correctly clustering around the real company Chunghwa Telecom (中華電信), Taiwan's dominant telecom operator. Official English name confirmed as 'Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd.' (listed as NYSE: CHT). Top entities are the official corporate site (cht.com.tw), its customer portal (123.cht.com.tw), and HiNet webmail (webmail.hinet.net), all legitimate Chunghwa Telecom properties. Remaining entities were lower-value tangential pages (third-party plan comparison site, a bill-payment portal, a recruitment/exam-prep site) not included in reported_entities. No WebSearch needed; company identity was unambiguous and well-established. Confidence scores were moderate (0.40-0.45), consistent with generic/informational page types rather than high-specificity company-profile pages.
